descriptions: The Errol Flynns are the precursors to the Brewster Boys, meaning the Brewster Boys succeeded them.
edges.evidence_quote: The Errol Flynns are recognized as the precursors to most, if not all, Detroit gangs that followed in their wake. Some of the most notable successors include the "Be Like Boys", "Dexter Boys" (an offshoot of YBI), "Schoolcraft Boys or SCB's", "SNS", "Fenkell Boys", "FMK" ("Fenkell Mafia Killers"), "7 Mile Killers or 7 Mile Dogs", "Linwood Boys", "Brewster Boys", "Jeffries Boys", and "8 Mile sconys", ("JBFL") "Joy Boys" or "Exit 9"

descriptions: Buccaneers were affiliated with Hells Angels and supplied stolen motorcycles for an attack.
edges.evidence_quote: police, acting on intelligence supplied by an informant in the Buccaneers, another motorcycle gang affiliated with the Hells Angels

descriptions: Buccaneers are a Hells Angels support club.
edges.evidence_quote: On 6 February 1992, police, acting on intelligence supplied by an informant in the Buccaneers – a Hells Angels support club – arrested eight Hells Angels members in Grenoble in connection with the shooting, as well as members of the Buccaneers who supplied the stolen motorcycles used in the attack.

descriptions: Buccaneers Confraternity is listed as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Supreme Eiye Confraternity, De Norsemen Kclub of Nigeria, and Buccaneers Confraternity

descriptions: Jokers is a puppet club of Hells Angels in St-Jean.
edges.evidence_quote: Every Quebec region had its own puppet club: the Rockers Motor Club in Montreal, the Rowdy Ones in Sorel, the Evil Ones in Drummondville, the Satan's Guard in the Saguenay region, and the Jokers in St-Jean

descriptions: The Jokers were a puppet club controlled by the Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: the Saint-Luc clubhouse of the Jokers, an Angels puppet club

Massa Carcerária.description: Brazilian criminal faction originating in the state of Ceará, founded in 2021 by former members of Comando Vermelho dissatisfied with the organization's leadership. It expanded through defections from Guardiões do Estado (GDE) and engaged in violent conflicts, including massacres and forced evictions. By 2022 it became the largest faction in Caucaia, and in 2023 formed an alliance with Primeiro Comando da Capital (PCC).

descriptions: Comando Vermelho lists Massa Carcerária as a rival in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: ... Massa Carcerária

descriptions: Comando Vermelho lists Massa Carcerária as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Primeiro Comando da Capital, Terceiro Comando Puro, Amigos dos Amigos, Police militias, Família do Norte, Guardiões do Estado, Bonde do Maluco, Bonde dos 40, Massa Carcerária

descriptions: Infobox lists Massa Carcerária as rival of GDE.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivais: CV , PCC , Massa Carcerária

descriptions: TDN/Massa is a dissident group from GDE.
edges.evidence_quote: a região é dominada quase completamente pelo grupo TDN ou MASSA, que é uma dissidência dos antigos membros da GDE

descriptions: Massa Carcerária and Comando Vermelho were formerly allies but entered a violent war after Massa's split.
edges.evidence_quote: A decisão provocou uma sangrenta guerra entre os antigos aliados, sobretudo, em regiões como a Grande Messejana e Caucaia.

descriptions: Members of Guardiões do Estado left their faction and joined Massa Carcerária.
edges.evidence_quote: Após a debandada de criminosos do CV, também integrantes da facção Guardiões do Estado (GDE) decidiram deixar o grupo e passaram a se autodenominar Massa.

descriptions: Massa Carcerária formed an alliance with the Primeiro Comando da Capital in mid-2023.
edges.evidence_quote: Em meados de 2023, a Massa passou a manter uma aliança com o Primeiro Comando da Capital (PCC).

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Latin America : TCP , BDM , EPP , FARC , Tren de Aragua , Jalisco Cartel , Massa Carcerária [ pt ] , Primer Cartel Uruguayo.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Latin America : TCP , BDM , EPP , FARC , Tren de Aragua , Jalisco Cartel , Massa Carcerária [ pt ] , Primer Cartel Uruguayo.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Batasuna , Herri Batasuna , FARC , FLB-ARB , Provisional IRA , Terra Lliure , Criminal elements within Republika Srpska (supply of arms)

descriptions: ETA cooperated with Terra Lliure, which based itself off ETA.
edges.evidence_quote: ETA cooperated with the Catalan nationalist movement, which had its own far-left separatist organization that based itself off ETA – Terra Lliure

descriptions: Terra Lliure was an ally of ETA; they coordinated actions and supported each other.
edges.evidence_quote: A Catalan revolutionary organization that based itself off ETA, Terra Lliure, was an ally of ETA, and both organizations coordinated their actions and supported each other.

descriptions: The Camorra gave stewardship of Castel Volturno to the Rapaces, a Nigerian criminal group.
edges.evidence_quote: The first town in which the Camorra sanctioned stewardship by a foreign clan was Castel Volturno, which was given to the Rapaces, clans from Lagos and Benin City in Nigeria.

descriptions: A Grey Wolves member commanded the Syrian Turkmen Brigades, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: The Turkmen rebel group operated under the command of Alparslan Çelik, a Turkish national and a Grey Wolves member from Elazığ.

Cártel de Santa Rosa de Lima.description: Mexican criminal organization based in Guanajuato, founded in 2014 by José Antonio Yépez Ortiz. Primarily involved in oil theft, as well as drug trafficking, extortion, and other crimes. It lost much of its territory after conflicts with the Jalisco New Generation Cartel and government raids, but maintains a presence in several Guanajuato towns. Its leader was captured in 2020.

Azuma-gumi.description: The Azuma-gumi is a yakuza organization based in Osaka, Japan. It is a designated yakuza group under the Organized Crime Countermeasures Law, with an estimated 50 active members. The group maintains its headquarters in Nishinari, Osaka, and is one of two designated yakuza groups in Osaka Prefecture, alongside the Sakaume-gumi.

descriptions: Both are designated yakuza groups in Osaka Prefecture, but no specific relationship is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: The Azuma-gumi is one of the two designated yakuza groups based in the Osaka Prefecture , along with the Sakaume-gumi

descriptions: Both are designated yakuza groups in Osaka Prefecture, but no specific relationship is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: The Sakaume-gumi is one of the two designated yakuza groups based in the Osaka Prefecture , along with the Azuma-gumi

descriptions: Los Cuinis became the financial arm of CJNG.
edges.evidence_quote: eran apoyados por el cártel de «Los Cuinis», quienes se convirtieron en el brazo financiero del CJNG.

descriptions: Los Cuinis, led by Abigael González Valencia, is described as the main financial operator of CJNG.

descriptions: Imperial Klans of Brazil is a Klan-inspired group.
edges.evidence_quote: a group called itself the Imperial Klans of Brazil was shut down in 2003

Native Mob.description: The Native Mob is a Native American street gang founded in the 1990s in Minneapolis, Minnesota. It is one of the largest and most violent Native American gangs in the U.S., active in Minnesota, Wisconsin, Colorado, and South Dakota. The gang engages in drug trafficking, assault, robbery, and murder, with an estimated 200 members as of 2021. Members have been placed on the FBI most wanted list in 2025.

descriptions: Bandidos attacked Los Traviesos members to steal their colors.
edges.evidence_quote: Three members of the Bandidos' El Paso chapter – president Juan Martinez, secretary Thomas Decarlo and sergeant-at-arms James Heredia – were charged with engaging in organized criminal activity-aggravated robbery after being accused of attacking and attempting to steal the colors of members of Los Traviesos Motorcycle Club in East El Paso on August 3, 2016.
